quotes.text: The most effective way to do it, is to do it.
quotes.author: Amelia Earhart

quotes.text: Never put off until tomorrow what you can do today.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: You just can't beat the person who never gives up.
quotes.author: Babe Ruth

quotes.text: If you find that you're going through hell, keep going.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: You cannot have a positive life and a negative mind.
quotes.author: Joyce Meyer

quotes.text: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
quotes.author: Suzy Kassem

quotes.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine, and shadows will fall behind you.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.text: The happiness of your life depends on the quality of your thoughts.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: Folks are usually about as happy as they make up their minds to be.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.text: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Develop success from failures. Discouragement and failure are two of the surest stepping stones to success.
quotes.author: Dale Carnegie

quotes.text: Never bend your head. Always hold it high. Look the world straight in the eye.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.text: We generate fears while we sit. We overcome them by action. Fear is nature’s way of warning us to get busy.
quotes.author: Dr. Henry Link

quotes.text: The best way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: I can’t change the direction of the wind, but I can adjust my sails to always reach my destination.
quotes.author: Jimmy Dean

quotes.text: We may encounter many defeats, but we must not be defeated.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Optimism is the faith that leads to achievement. Nothing can be done without hope and confidence.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.text: Courage is more exhilarating than fear and in the long run it is easier. We do not have to become heroes overnight. Just one step at a time, meeting each thing that comes up, seeing it is not as dreadful as it appeared, discovering we have the strength to stare it down.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: For every reason it’s not possible, there are hundreds of people who have faced the same circumstances and succeeded.
quotes.author: Jack Canfield
